summary.zh: 从主动悬挂与电子辅助的技术军备竞赛，到 1994 年电子辅助禁令后重新回归车手技术的年代——舒马赫、塞纳、普罗斯特与希尔家族先后在这十年写下自己的冠军故事。
summary.en: From the active-suspension and electronic-aid arms race to the return of pure driver skill after the 1994 ban — Schumacher, Senna, Prost, and the Hill family each wrote their own championship chapter across the decade.
